case_title: CATO, JAMES R. VS DEWOLFE REALTY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CATO, JAMES R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DEWOLFE REALTY COMPANY PLAINTIFF UNABLE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF BY THE PREPONDERANCE OF EVIDENCE.(CONFLICTING EVIDENCE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

TRIAL RESET TO JUL-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-25-1994, OFF CALENDAR
